 ---> abc123def456
Step 2/5 : WORKDIR /app
 ---> Using cache
Step 3/5 : COPY package*.json ./
 ---> Using cache
Step 4/5 : RUN npm ci
 ---> Running in container

npm ERR! ERESOLVE unable to resolve dependency tree
npm ERR!

npm ERR! peer react@"^17.0.0" from some-old-lib@2.1.0
